subject: Discrete Random Variables
topic: §14 Probability Mass Function and Cumulative Distribution Function
question: In the previous problem, describe the cumulative distribution function by a formula and by a graph.
explanation: Answer: $F(x) = \begin{cases} 0, & x < 0 \\ \frac{1}{8}, & 0 \le x < 1 \\ \frac{1}{2}, & 1 \le x < 2 \\ \frac{7}{8}, & 2 \le x < 3 \\ 1, & 3 \le x \end{cases}$
